reference: Cecconi, Augusto & Di Ciccio (2021). BPM Forum 2021, LNBIP 427, pp. 73–91.

scientific_description.null_hypothesis: No difference in Confidence between Deviant (re-submission required) and Regular (Normal) variants for rule r.
scientific_description.permutation_scheme: shuffleLog: encoded trace vectors randomly reassigned between L_A and L_B preserving group sizes. Equivalent to label permutation on pre-cached evaluations. Structural axis (within-trace ordering) NOT nullified.
scientific_description.p_value: p_Cecconi(r) = C(r)/π  (Algorithm 1 line 20; min = 1/π). p_Phipson(r) = C(r)/(π+1)  (super-uniform, Phipson & Smyth 2010).
scientific_description.fdr_note: No FDR correction. Raw per-rule α threshold. Structural axis not nullified → empirical FDR > α under doubly-null.
scientific_description.shared_pool_note: Hierarchical simplification DISABLED. M_tested = M_all at default mmin=0, mdiff_min=0. FDR comparison not confounded by candidate scope differences.
